impact:
Blocks `npm run build` on strict TypeScript. Pre-existing Basejump v0.0.3 bug — was masked by stale `.next` cache. Now exposed after T-001 purged .next during dead-code cleanup. Every subsequent BUILD verification in autonomous mode will fail until fixed. Similar untyped-children pattern may exist in sibling Basejump components (settings/layout.tsx sibling files).</impact>
<parameter name="components">["src/app/dashboard/(personalAccount)/settings/layout.tsx", "basejump"]
resolution: Al opgelost: src/app/dashboard/(personalAccount)/settings/layout.tsx heeft `{children}: {children: React.ReactNode}` typing. `npx tsc --noEmit` passeert zonder implicit any errors. Marker gesloten 2026-07-04.
title: Basejump boilerplate: implicit any type in PersonalAccountSettingsPage children param
